codeReview.summary: Commit 756ec61 fulfills the feature contract: CI exposes distinct gate identities for lint, vitest, pytest, and playwright; local command wiring mirrors those layers through ci:* scripts and services manifest mappings; fail-closed behavior is preserved; and the 3100/3101 environment contract remains aligned with Playwright/server wiring.

summary: Reviewed features.json contract, handoff, transcript skeleton, skill procedure, and full commit diff. The implementation is contract-aligned and no blocking or non-blocking defects were found within this feature scope.
